_provenance: schema-derived from AC-V3.1 .env variable names FLEET_CORRELATION_PCT, FLEET_CORRELATION_WINDOW_MINUTES, FLEET_CORRELATION_CLEAR_MINUTES. Values chosen to verify non-default configs work. No producer-computed floats.

cases.label: custom_pct_threshold_0_75_not_tripped_at_70pct
cases.note: With FLEET_CORRELATION_PCT=0.75, 7 of 10 (70%) does NOT trip

cases.label: custom_window_1_min_excludes_older_events
cases.note: With FLEET_CORRELATION_WINDOW_MINUTES=1, events from 2 minutes ago fall outside window
cases.note_detail: 3 events: oldest at now-2min (outside), 2 inside window. 2 of 4 = 50% — strict > means no trip
